svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 1018px; height: 1px; padding-top: 33px; margin-left: 41px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #333333;
display: inline-block; font-size: 15px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#333333, #c1c1c1); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div: user suite CI 経路（pr.yml smoke / nightly.yml full / _reusable-e2e-user.yml 委譲）

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 238px; height: 1px; padding-top: 98px; margin-left: 61px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #444444;
display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#444444, #b3b3b3); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div: trigger: PR 毎 (push / 再起動)

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(218, 232, 252), rgb(29, 41, 59)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(108, 142, 191), rgb(92, 121, 163));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 238px; height: 1px; padding-top: 175px; margin-left: 61px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
pr.yml
path-filter で smoke 起動判定
.github/path-filter/filters.yaml で
tests/e2e/user/smoke + src/sdk/* + src/tier1/

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 278px; height: 1px; padding-top: 98px; margin-left: 401px;

div.div:
nightly.yml
cron 18:00 UTC = 03:00 JST
workflow_dispatch で手動起動可

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(218, 232, 252), rgb(29, 41, 59)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(108, 142, 191), rgb(92, 121, 163));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 498px; height: 1px; padding-top: 315px; margin-left: 221px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
_reusable-e2e-user.yml
workflow_call inputs: mode (smoke / full)
runs-on: ubuntu-latest (14GB / 4 vCPU)
steps: setup go → install kind → make e2e-user-{mode} → upload artifact

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 242, 204), rgb(40, 29, 0)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(215, 155, 0), rgb(153, 101, 0));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 238px; height: 1px; padding-top: 435px; margin-left: 61px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
make e2e-user-smoke
up.sh --role user-e2e
tests/e2e/user/smoke/
5 分以内

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 242, 204), rgb(40, 29, 0)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(215, 155, 0), rgb(153, 101, 0));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 238px; height: 1px; padding-top: 435px; margin-left: 641px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
make e2e-user-full
up.sh --role user-e2e + 任意 stack
tests/e2e/user/{smoke + examples}
30〜45 分

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 398px; height: 1px; padding-top: 528px; margin-left: 351px;

div.div:
artifact: result.json + stdout.log + screenshots
14 日 retention (actions/upload-artifact@v4)
